objective: Resolve the circular CI blocker by combining the minimum dependency-security remediation and Stage 8 governance drift repair in one unblock PR. Positive claims: POSTCSS-AUDIT-001 resolves GHSA-r28c-9q8g-f849 by pinning/resolving postcss to 8.5.23 without downgrading Next; STAGE8-MARKER-001 keeps the Stage 8 container scan script aligned with the documented Docker Scout fallback by including the docker scout cves command form and critical/high severity filter; STAGE8-DOC-001 keeps Stage 6/8 documentation aligned with the executable checker by recording the exact voice-manifest JSON marker; UNBLOCK-SCOPE-001 supersedes the split draft PRs #286 and #288 because each is blocked by the other half of the required CI gate. Negative invariants: no product runtime code, no Next downgrade, no provider setup, no paid spend, no issue-closing keywords for #249 or #280, no PR #284 mutation, no broad Stage 8 rework, and no production-readiness claim. Evidence must include old-behavior reproduction of the split-PR circular blocker, focused checker validation, npm audit, make dependency-audit, make security, make secrets-scan, frontend test/typecheck/lint/build, make quality, make ci, forced pull-request guardrails, GitHub CI, and human-only latest-head approval/merge-message review before merge.
